caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on a political event involving Tejashwi Yadav. The scene shows a man seated inside a car, being interviewed by journalists holding microphones with logos of various news channels such as ANI and News Nation. The man seems to be responding to questions, possibly addressing a controversy or issue related to the Congress party, as indicated by the headline "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" which translates to "Congress shaken up, Tejashwi's 'picture' remains." The background includes portraits of other political figures like Nitish Kumar, Prem Kumar, and Vijay Chaudhary, suggesting that the discussion might involve their roles or reactions to the situation. The timestamp indicates that this segment aired at 10:02 PM.
